commands.name: setup
commands.description: Set up or refresh the local Scout installation used by Claude Code
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Preserve any follow-up commands exactly.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Run Scout operational checks for the local broker, service, and support paths
commands.readmeSummary: check broker, service, and support paths
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Preserve any error details and follow-up commands exactly.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show Scout readiness, current sender, routable agents, and recent activity
commands.readmeSummary: show doctor, sender, agents, and recent activity
postInstructions: Present the command output as a compact status view. Do not invent unavailable state.

commands.name: whoami
commands.description: Show which Scout identity this Claude Code session will speak as

commands.name: who
commands.description: List routable Scout agents for the current project context
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. If multiple agents share a short name, keep the fully-qualified handles visible.

commands.name: agents
commands.description: List available Scout agents and their routable handles
commands.readmeSummary: list available agents and their routable handles
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Prefer fully-qualified handles when the output shows ambiguity.

commands.name: latest
commands.description: Show recent Scout messages, flights, and broker activity
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Preserve ids and refs exactly.

commands.name: send
commands.description: Send a Scout tell, status update, FYI, or wake message without waiting for a reply
commands.readmeSummary: send a tell, FYI, status update, or wake message
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Do not reinterpret message body mentions as routing if the user passed `--to`, `--ref`, or `--channel`.

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask a Scout agent to do owned work or return a concrete answer
commands.readmeSummary: ask an agent for owned work or a concrete answer
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Preserve flight ids, refs, target labels, and the returned answer exactly.

commands.name: broadcast
commands.description: Broadcast an explicit Scout announcement to channel.shared
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Use this command only for messages genuinely intended for everyone.

commands.name: up
commands.description: Start or revive a Scout agent by name, handle, or project path
commands.readmeSummary: start or revive a Scout agent
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Preserve any resolved agent identity or follow-up command exactly.

commands.name: ps
commands.description: Show local Scout-launched agent processes and session state
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Preserve process/session ids and state labels exactly.

commands.name: open
commands.description: Open the Scout web UI for the current local broker
postInstructions: Present the command output as-is. Preserve the opened URL when Scout prints one.
